name: Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation Limited
analysis: FPH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$32.0100, stop A$29.5416, target A$39.4152 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
